original_hypothesis.title: Uniswap V3 position tracking gaps after staking NFT in Pancakeswap MasterChef
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: PancakeswapConnector.sendPositionToMasterChef transfers the Uniswap V3 NFT out of the connector, but the UNIv3Connector TVL logic and position management flows may assume the NFT is still held by the connector. This can cause TVL under/over-reporting or inability to manage (collect/decrease/burn) positions until withdrawn.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: If accounting relies on Uniswap position state but the NFT is staked elsewhere, operational TVL and withdraw flows may break, creating solvency/accounting mismatches. Attackers could exploit valuation mismatches if share issuance/redemption uses these TVL numbers.
deployment_assumptions: Vault issues/redeems shares based on TVL that includes Uniswap V3 positions through this connector
Positions are sent to MasterChef and remain staked during periods where TVL is computed
original_hypothesis.config_evidence: No deployment scripts show special handling for staked NFTs; PancakeswapConnector explicitly transfers NFT to MasterChef without registry position updates.

proof_of_signal.pattern: IERC721(positionManager).safeTransferFrom(address(this), address(masterchef), tokenId); // NFT leaves connector; no corresponding registry holdingPosition update

preconditions: Connector holds a Uniswap V3 position and registers it in registry
Position NFT is transferred to MasterChef for staking
TVL computation or position actions (collect/decrease/burn) are attempted while NFT is staked

initial_operational_evidence.suspicious_workflow: TVL calculations revert or misreport after NFT is staked; management functions fail due to missing ownership of tokenId
initial_operational_evidence.admin_dependency: Requires keeper/manager to stake positions; attacker benefit depends on share pricing system behavior

operational_questions: Does UNIv3Connector/PancakeswapConnector TVL logic read per-NFT state or aggregated pool state, and does it depend on NFT ownership?
Are there accounting manager safeguards if a connector TVL calculation fails or returns 0?
Are registry holding positions updated to reflect staking location/state?
validation_requirements: Integration test: open UNIv3 position, stake it, then call TVLHelper.getTVL and connector management methods
Check whether positionManager.collect/decreaseLiquidity require NFT ownership (expected yes)
Determine whether MasterChef exposes position value in a way used by _getPositionTVL (it does not here)

preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_1: Ensure a vault strategy stakes NFTs via sendPositionToMasterChef
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_2: Trigger share issuance/redemption around TVL mispricing windows (if any)
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_3: Exploit any mismatch to extract value (depends on AccountingManager share price mechanics)
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_4: Withdraw position from MasterChef to restore normal operations
preliminary_attack_methodology.coordination_requirements: High; depends on keeper actions and share accounting details

potential_operational_impact.operational_disruption: Inability to manage/close UniV3 positions while staked; TVL misreporting
potential_operational_impact.recovery_difficulty: Medium (requires withdrawing NFT and reconciling accounting)
potential_operational_impact.affected_operations: LP strategies using Pancakeswap MasterChef staking

execution_requirements_analysis.operational_timing: during periods of staking and active share operations

investigation_priorities.on_chain_signals: NFT transfers from connector to MasterChef; concurrent TVL anomalies
investigation_priorities.operational_anomalies: Failed collect/decrease/burn attempts; discrepancies in reported vs expected LP value
investigation_priorities.behavioral_patterns: Share issuance/redemption clustered around staking events

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
